attributes.action: PREVENT INCENTIVE PAYMENTS TO ASYLUM SEEKERS OF UPTO £40,000
attributes.background:
Scrap the newly invented trial scheme for illegal immigrants receiving upto £40,000 payment to leave the UK
This isn’t acting as a deterrent but an incentive for illegal immigrants to come to the UK.
It sends the wrong message that if they fail to stay here they will be paid to leave.

rejection.details: You may wish to sign this petition, which calls for the same action: "Stop pilot scheme giving up to £40,000 to failed asylum seeker families" https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/763401
